---
title: "Redwood Road, San Lorenzo to Temescal"
---


<a href="https://www.strava.com/activities/18234048917" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
  <i class="fa-brands fa-strava"></i> Example Strava effort
</a>

```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="San Leandro" data-miles="24.55" data-elevation="2641.08">

<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/redwood-san-leandro-macarthur-bart/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>San Leandro</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>24.55</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>2641.08 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br>85/100</p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Route

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/redwood-san-leandro-macarthur-bart/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Mellow</td>
      <td>17.18</td>
      <td>70.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>4.27</td>
      <td>17.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>1.54</td>
      <td>6.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>1.19</td>
      <td>5.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Danger Zone</td>
      <td>0.38</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Climb Chunks

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/redwood-san-leandro-macarthur-bart/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>route_part</th>
      <th>road_name</th>
      <th>distance_mi</th>
      <th>time_low_min</th>
      <th>time_fast_min</th>
      <th>rest_time_after_min</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>8.9</td>
      <td>106.0</td>
      <td>51.0</td>
      <td>87.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Estudillo Avenue</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>10.0</td>
      <td>5.0</td>
      <td>16.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Walnut Road</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>10.0</td>
      <td>5.0</td>
      <td>13.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Redwood Road</td>
      <td>2.3</td>
      <td>28.0</td>
      <td>14.0</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Redwood Road</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>7.0</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Redwood Road</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>7.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (easy)</td>
      <td>Redwood Road</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>4.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (easy)</td>
      <td>Redwood Road</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>4.0</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Redwood Road</td>
      <td>2.6</td>
      <td>31.0</td>
      <td>15.0</td>
      <td>12.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Leimert Boulevard</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>11.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Saint James Drive</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>10.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Grand Avenue</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>5.0</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
      <td>7.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/redwood-san-leandro-macarthur-bart/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>pci_available</th>
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>13.3</td>
      <td>54.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>5.2</td>
      <td>21.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>2.7</td>
      <td>11.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>1.6</td>
      <td>6.4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>3.8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>2.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>PCI Available</td>
      <td>Failed</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>1.6</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

:::
